englishDefinitions: Pulled or removed suddenly from a situation, state, or activity.
Forced to stop being absorbed in something, often abruptly.
persianTranslation: ناگهان از چیزی بیرون کشیده شدن
examples: The loud phone call yanked him out of it.
She was yanked out of it when her boss asked for an immediate report.
A sudden interruption yanked them out of it.
